approver: Approver — verified each vs csr.v read-mux RTL 2026-06-09; FSM N/A (csr.v has no encoded FSM state register, URG no-shape)

waivers.structural_basis: mstatus_val={19'b0,mpp,3'b0,mpie,3'b0,mie,3'b0} (csr.v:92) — WPRI/reserved fields hardwired 0; only MIE[3]/MPIE[7]/MPP[12:11] implemented — RTL-hardwired constant, cannot toggle.
waivers.stimulus_considered: all M-mode CSR writes (0xAAAA/0x5555) + trap/IRQ inputs driven; these bits are RTL constants in the readback mux
waivers.spike_impact: none (coverage-only; implemented CSR fields are Spike-lockstep-correct)

waivers.structural_basis: mstatus_val[12:11]=MPP is hardwired 2'b11 (csr.v localparam mstatus_mpp=2'b11, ADR-0015: M-only hart, MPP read-only WARL=M). Constant -> the 1->0 toggle edge is unreachable.
waivers.stimulus_considered: directed CSR write of MPP=2'b00 issued (WARL test) — DUT correctly keeps 2'b11; the bits never go to 0
waivers.spike_impact: none (coverage-only; MPP=M is spec-correct for M-only hart)
